    "support/operator/driver.py:1449 `_path_allowed_by_write_scope` (forbidden-first, then allowed) and :1481 `_path_forbidden_by_write_scope` (forbidden-only); :1442 `_sandbox_changed_paths` via git status --porcelain.",
